query:
SELECT
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.incident_description,
  c.normalised_description,
  c.key_facts_json,
  a.damaged_components_json,
  a.damage_description,
  a.cost_intelligence_json,
  a.parts_reconciliation_json,
  a.enriched_photos_json,
  a.pipeline_run_summary,
  a.physics_analysis
FROM claims c
LEFT JOIN ai_assessments a ON a.claim_id = c.id
WHERE c.id = 2730001
